name: 8.4oz Glass Ribbed Cassin Short Tumbler - Threshold™
description:
Enjoy your favorite beverages in style from the 8.4-Ounce Glass Ribbed Cassin Short Tumbler from Threshold™. This short tumbler features a ribbed design with a round base for a textured look you'll love. Made of glass, this Cassin tumbler is dishwasher safe for easy cleanup after use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
